Description: Full-service truck plaza at US-27 (Okeechobee Rd) and SR-826 (Palmetto Expressway), near the southern terminus of I-75. Gated 24-hour lot with diesel fuel, showers, laundry, convenience store/deli, Cuban restaurant, CAT scale, and truck service bays.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Palmetto Truck Plaza, Hialeah Gardens
Description: CAT Scale at Palmetto Truck Plaza (US-27 / SR-826), near the southern terminus of I-75.

Large (reported ~51-acre) secured truck and trailer parking facility in Hialeah Gardens with a fully fenced perimeter, lighting, CCTV surveillance and security patrols; 24-hour access. Operator advertises quick access to I-75, I-95 and the Palmetto Expressway, near the southern end of I-75.
Secure storage facility at 19701 Sheridan St, near the US-27 / I-75 (Sheridan St, Exit 11) area in West Pembroke Pines, offering covered and uncovered enclosed parking for cars, trucks and trailers.

The only fuel/service plaza on Alligator Alley (I-75) crossing the Everglades, on the Miccosukee Reservation at approximately I-75 Exit 49. Open 24 hours with 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, convenience store/deli, gift shop, Glades Cafe and Dunkin', showers, WiFi, ATM, and a lighted, paved lot with 18-wheeler and RV parking. This is the last/first services for the ~50+ mile stretch of I-75 with no other stops between Naples and the Fort Lauderdale end.

Business Name: Collier County Rest Area (Alligator Alley, Milepost 63)
Description: FDOT rest area on I-75/Alligator Alley in Collier County at approximately milepost 63, roughly 37 miles east of the Naples toll plaza. The facility sits on the south side of the toll road and is accessible from both northbound and southbound directions, with restrooms, roofed picnic tables and parking used by truck drivers to rest.

Commercial truck and equipment tire dealer/service in Naples serving the I-75 corridor. Offers new commercial and agricultural tires, tire sales, 24-hour tire repair, roadside assistance, and wheel alignment. Authorized dealer for Michelin, Bridgestone and Cooper commercial tires.

Full-service truck and tire shop in Naples near I-75 (listed at Exit 105), open 24 hours, 7 days a week. Services include truck repair, tire repair, tire sales, wheel alignment, rotation/balancing, and 24-hour road service.

Family-owned/operated 24/7 mobile roadside assistance and towing based in Naples, serving the I-75 corridor for over 30 years. Services include tire repair and replacement, mechanical breakdowns, fuel delivery, jump starts, lock-outs, load swaps, winch-outs, trailer maintenance and towing.

24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-75 Exit 139 (Luckett Rd), Fort Myers. About 80 truck parking spaces (15 reserved, 15 paid), 7 fuel lanes, 6 showers, CAT Scale, DEF, WiFi, ATM, propane, and 24-hour convenience store.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-75 Exit 143 (Bayshore Rd), North Fort Myers. 8 fuel lanes, 5 showers, CAT Scale, DEF, on-site Subway and Wendy's, WiFi, and a Love's Truck Care center (2 bays: oil/PM, tires, light mechanical).

24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-75 Exit 161 (Jones Loop Rd), Punta Gorda. 8 fuel lanes, 5 showers, CAT Scale, DEF, WiFi, ATM, deli, game room, and on-site fast food (Arby's, Waffle House, Burger King, Subway).
Shell-branded fuel stop with truck parking at I-75 Exit 170 (Kings Hwy), Port Charlotte. Paved truck parking, diesel, convenience store, on-site Dunkin', WiFi, and ATM.
Shell-branded fuel stop with truck parking at I-75 Exit 164 (Duncan Rd/US-17), Punta Gorda. Directory-listed with truck parking, restaurant/deli, and convenience store.

Business Name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #352, Fort Myers
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Pilot Travel Center #352, I-75 Exit 139, Fort Myers.

Business Name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #495, North Fort Myers
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Love's Travel Stop #495, I-75 Exit 143, North Fort Myers.

Business Name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #94, Punta Gorda
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Pilot Travel Center #94, I-75 Exit 161, Punta Gorda.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care #495 - North Fort Myers
Description: Love's Truck Care service center at Love's #495, I-75 Exit 143, North Fort Myers. 2 service bays offering oil change/PM, tire sales and repair (Hankook, Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retreads), and light mechanical service.

Business Name: Big Ass Truck Wash - North Fort Myers
Description: Touch-free truck and trailer wash in North Fort Myers, near I-75 Exit 143 (Bayshore Rd). Automated touchless wash for trucks, trailers, and oversized vehicles.

Business Name: Florida Weigh Station - I-75 Northbound (Punta Gorda)
Description: FDOT commercial vehicle weigh/inspection station on I-75 Northbound near Mile Marker 158-159 in Charlotte County (about 3 miles south of Exit 161, Punta Gorda). Weigh-in-motion / static scale; PrePass available.

ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Travel Center #89) at I-75 Exit 224 in Ellenton. Open 24 hours with 4 diesel fuel lanes, DEF, 2 showers, restrooms, convenience store, WiFi, ATM, check cashing, and propane. Multiple driver reports and the official listing indicate no on-site truck parking.

Circle K truck stop at I-75 Exit 220-A on SR-64 in Bradenton. Open 24 hours with 24-hour diesel (3 fuel lanes), bulk DEF, convenience store, ATM, propane, WiFi, and a lighted lot with a small number of truck spaces. Hosts a CAT Scale (listed separately). No showers on site.
Certified CAT Scale located at the Circle K truck stop at I-75 Exit 220 in Bradenton. Weigh service via the CAT Scale network (1-877-CAT-SCALE / Weigh My Truck app).

Business Name: Bcity Tire Service and Sales, Inc.
Description: Tire sales and service shop in Bradenton (Manatee County) offering commercial truck tire service, 24-hour roadside tire assistance across the Manatee/Sarasota area, and fleet/commercial vehicle washing. Near I-75 Exit 220 (SR-64) corridor.

Mobile commercial truck tire repair and 24/7 roadside assistance serving Bradenton, Palmetto, Ellenton, Parrish, Lakewood Ranch and surrounding Tampa Bay, including I-75 interchanges and highway calls for semi trucks and fleets.
